SEARCH
Package com.mps.deepviolet.api

Class TargetSpec

java.lang.Object
com.mps.deepviolet.api.TargetSpec
public final class TargetSpec extends Object
Parses host specification strings into scan target URLs.

Supported formats:

  • Hostname: github.com → https://github.com:443
  • Hostname + port: github.com:8443 → https://github.com:8443
  • URL: https://github.com/ → as-is
  • IPv4: 192.168.1.1 → https://192.168.1.1:443
  • IPv4 + port: 192.168.1.1:636 → https://192.168.1.1:636
  • IPv6: [::1] → https://[::1]:443
  • IPv6 + port: [::1]:8443 → https://[::1]:8443
  • IP range: 192.168.1.1-192.168.1.10 → 10 targets
  • CIDR: 10.0.0.0/24 → 254 targets (.1-.254)
  • CIDR + port: 10.0.0.0/24:636 → 254 targets on port 636
Author:
Milton Smith

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static List<URL>
    parse(String spec)
    Parse a single target spec string into URLs using the default port (443).
    static List<URL>
    parse(String spec, int defaultPort)
    Parse a single target spec string into URLs with a default port override.
    static List<URL>
    parseAll(Collection<String> specs)
    Parse multiple specs, expanding ranges/CIDRs, deduplicating.
    static List<URL>
    parseAll(Collection<String> specs, int defaultPort)
    Parse multiple specs with default port override.

  • Method Details

    • parse

      public static List<URL> parse(String spec) throws DeepVioletException
      Parse a single target spec string into URLs using the default port (443).
      Parameters:
      spec - target specification string
      Returns:
      list of parsed URLs
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - on invalid spec

    • parse

      public static List<URL> parse(String spec, int defaultPort) throws DeepVioletException
      Parse a single target spec string into URLs with a default port override.
      Parameters:
      spec - target specification string
      defaultPort - default port when none is specified
      Returns:
      list of parsed URLs
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - on invalid spec

    • parseAll

      public static List<URL> parseAll(Collection<String> specs) throws DeepVioletException
      Parse multiple specs, expanding ranges/CIDRs, deduplicating.
      Parameters:
      specs - collection of target specification strings
      Returns:
      deduplicated list of URLs in insertion order
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - on invalid spec

    • parseAll

      public static List<URL> parseAll(Collection<String> specs, int defaultPort) throws DeepVioletException
      Parse multiple specs with default port override.
      Parameters:
      specs - collection of target specification strings
      defaultPort - default port when none is specified
      Returns:
      deduplicated list of URLs in insertion order
      Throws:
      DeepVioletException - on invalid spec
